metadata.description: Single-plugin marketplace for apple-hig — design and review UIs to Apple's Human Interface Guidelines.

plugins.name: apple-hig
plugins.description: Automatically design and review UIs to Apple's Human Interface Guidelines (iOS, iPadOS, macOS, watchOS, tvOS, visionOS) — and judge web, macOS, and desktop software by their own standards, never forced iOS chrome. Complete on-disk reference, a measuring design-reviewer subagent (contrast, target size, visual-weight hierarchy, large-text/reflow/RTL stress) — including native JUCE/C++ apps via a drop-in design probe — and /hig-review, /hig-scaffold, /hig-tokens, /hig-sync commands.
